review_text: He does a really good job , works steady and informs you really well
I love Removery Friendswood!

I'm on appointment number eight
The service is always quick
The removal is not painless because it's not possible to be painless.
But they do the best they can to help mitigate that they give you an ice pack to numb the area.

The staff are friendly and always make sure to ask how your day is or what you're up to, as well as ensure that you get your next appointment scheduled without walking out that door right after your appointment absent mindedly.

My gf is telling me that I look bald for the first time in our relationship. Lol. Im getting tattoo removal on my entire head and DaShawn is the technician taking care of the removal. Its definitely a lengthy process but most definitely worth it. Ask for DaShawn!
The team made me feel safe and comfortable!  They explained everything before the service!  I recommend them 10 out of 10!!
Great customer service not pushy, very upfront.   The tech talked me through it did an amazing job. Highly recommend checking the location at  friendwoods out....
First treatment down and was painless. Deshaun explained everything and was very gentle. Can’t wait for my next session.

Fourth treatment. Slow and steady wins the race. If anyone is thinking you're going to come in and get a tattoo removed in one session, you need to do more research. Staff is knowledgeable. Yes it hurts worse than getting the tattoo. The tattoo is starting to break up and get removed by my lymphatic system.
Lovely atmosphere.  Just two forms to fill out and pricing is feasible. Great experience.

Hi! Just want to share my great experience with DeShawn of Removery Friendswood. I love working with DeShawn. For the couple of times I’ve been to the office regarding my tattoo removal, He always provides A1 customer service, makes me feel comfortable and at ease and answered all my questions.  Deshawn is great at what he does!

Destany and Deshawn are awesome! I’ve been to another location before, but they make this place feel so comforting and definitely making this my home store. Great atmosphere and vibes and always super quick service!
Deshawn is a great technician and always makes the appointment as comfortable as possible
DeShawn is most patient! He plays cool jams during your session which is helpful, puts you at ease. They are on top of scheduling your next session, most professional, I highly recommend.
Great experience!

Very knowledgeable and good environment.... UPDATE: I went to Jess for over a year.  She is very knowledgeable.  I went in for my appointment 15mins late.  Instead of canceling and/or rescheduling I believe she purposely burned me. The reason I believe this is because she didn't say one word to me until after the short procedure, which is unusual.  I could also tell that she was annoyed that I was late because she kept looking out of the front window.  (Unfortunately, I was dealing with a serious family matter over the phone) I would have totally understood if she had to cancel my appointment!  As I was leaving she sarcastically told me to have a nice day.
I reached out to the company and the general manager was helpful.  They said there was an investigation but they could not give me details.  I now have to drive to channelview once my finger heals to finish getting my tattoo removed.  Just be careful in choosing who you allow to use a laser on you.  And if you are late with Jess at the Webster location, just reschedule regardless if they let you in or not. This is a picture over a month after being burned..

Deshawn and Destiney are amazing! They both build great rapport with their clients and are extremely knowledgeable on tattoo removal. The process is fast and Deshawn talks you through it keeping you calm during the process. Thank you both! 🫶🏼🥰

I’ve been coming here for tattoo removal and I truly love this place! Destany at the front desk is always so bubbly  and I mean always. She’s incredibly nice, welcoming, and makes you feel comfortable the moment you walk through the door. Her energy really sets the tone for the whole visit.

Deshawn, the tattoo removal technician, is amazing at what he does. He’s always on it and gets you in and out efficiently, but you never feel rushed. The way he moves the tattoo removal machine, you can tell he knows his job from front to back, especially when working around detailed lines.

He’s quiet at first, but once you start talking to him especially about his family  you can tell he’s such a genuine family man who really loves his kids. It just shows the kind of heart he has. He’s very nice, professional, and makes you feel comfortable throughout the entire process.

I also really appreciate that he puts safety first every time making sure you have your protective glasses on, using ice packs, and checking in to make sure you’re okay.

The whole experience is smooth, professional, and welcoming every single visit. I highly recommend them to anyone considering tattoo removal!
So great, went in for consultation and ended up getting my first session 20 minutes later!

I always have such a good experience when I come for my treatments ! I love a good chit chat when I first walk in & DeShawn is great through out the process once in the actual room. Good vibes always & it makes the experience a lot easier !!
Love this location! The staff here are very friendly and helpful. Overall having tattoos removed takes a lot of time, but the staff here make the process so much better!
My first time at this Location. It was a great experience. DaShawn was my technician and he was professional and kind. The sweet girl at the front desk was also very nice and helpful.
Awesome customers service. The staff is very friendly and welcoming!
Fast and easy process! Friendly staff and great service! Definitely recommend!

Honestly… tattoo removal terrified me. I just finished my fourth session. The anticipation beforehand never gets easier but it helps a lot walking in to a technician who knows what they’re doing. DeShawn is very informative on the process and provides good tips and also knows how to make the process beforehand easy. From icing correctly, letting you take breaks when needed, and talking you through the painful moments (keep breathing, etc). He knows what he’s doing and I am grateful to have a great studio near me and a reverent technician as well. I must say, the Removery crew has been very helpful and they do use the best lasers. My tattoo healing process has been crazy, but beautiful. Thank you, Removery.

Came in with my husband to get a removal in order to enlist in the military and Destani immediately assisted me. She was very sweet and informative and answered every question we had. We were able to get in right after signing paperwork and start the sessions! Deshawn was amazing, very reassuring and his area was clean and well organized while the ambiance was relaxing! He was amazing!
Deshawn and Destani were awesome, the treatment was quick and easy, wasn’t painful at all!
Great atmosphere and caring professionals

If you are considering tattoo removal I highly recommend this location! The staff are amazing, extremely helpful and talk everything over with you so you feel comfortable. My tattoo is looking amazing, so excited to finally have it gone. Thank you so much!
Deshawn was wonderful!
Awesome and fun environment that really makes you feel at ease. DeShawn is incredible and provides an explanation for everything he does and takes his time answering any/all questions.
Quick service, nice people and very.informative consultation process.

So far so good. I went in for a consult, and didn't expect much more than that. They worked with me on a payment plan, and I started the removal process. It wasn't near a painful as I had heard. It will be well worth the pain and price to be ride of something that reminds me of a very bad time in my life.
This location is nice, clean, and they treated me well. Friendly, understanding, and quick.
Very friendly staff!! The office is clean and well organized. I arrived feeling very nervous, and the tech Deshawn helped me feel comfortable and explained every step along the way.
The best
Thanks fast keep doing a great job
Second time visiting for treatment and they have excellent service

I have had these ugly birds on the backs of my arms for 15+ years and I’m so self conscious about them. I’ve gone the saline injection route to remove them in the past but never finished. Made an appointment yesterday for a consultation today, walked out less than an hour later with no birds on my arms. Destiny was so great. She explained everything so well and I really had no concerns going into it. DeShawn was just as amazing. He walked me through the whole process and explained the how and the why. Once I made up my mind, he said “let’s do it now!” Which I fully intended to procrastinate and put it off for another 3 months.lol I’m grateful I made this appointment today and so relieved to see results so fast. Their studio is clean, warm and welcoming. Thank you!!!

If you are considering tattoo removal, I recommend this location as I’ve been a client for several years. I have several tattoos that are in the removal process. They’ve already successfully removed one as if it never existed. Deshawn is an amazing technician. He also has an awesome playlist of music and mentally that helps haha He walks you through every appointment step by step. He is professional and knowledgeable. Tattoo removal is definitely a journey and I am so grateful for the level of service and care at this location.
